synopsis: As the First Order spreads fear across the galaxy, Leia, Rey, Chewie, and Finn rush to deliver aid to a Twi’lek colony. But upon arriving, they find something much worse than Stormtroopers: the terrifying Nightlander! The heroes must scramble to stop the otherworldly fiend, lest it escape into the land of the living and make the galaxy its ghastly domain! • Introducing the Nightlander, a Star Wars boogeyman designed by legendary artist Iain McCaig! • Written by Cavan Scott, the New York Times bestselling author of Star Wars Adventures: Vader’s Castle and a story architect of The High Republic initiative. • Featuring cover art by the iconic horror artist Francesco Francavilla! • Three-issue series.
title: Star Wars: Tales From the Nightlands #3
